items.translated_title: Polymarket saw $529M traded on bets tied to bombing of Iran

images.alt: A Polymarket advertisement in a subway station in New York, US, on Thursday, Feb. 5, 2026. Kalshi and Polymarket, which have been assailed by critics for encouraging financial risk taking by making betting more accessible, are now using the promise of free groceries to win over New Yorkers.

items.content: Six newly-created accounts made a profit of $1 million by correctly betting that the U.S. would strike Iran by February 28.
